---
title: "Basic Workflow: Model Specification, Bundle, & MCMC"
---




> **Legacy vignette (for the website / historical notes).**
> These files may not match the current exported API one-to-one.
> Last verified: **2026-01-18**.
>
> For the up-to-date workflow, see the main package vignettes (basic, unconditional, conditional, and causal)..

[Workflow roadmap](../roadmap.html){.btn .btn-outline-light}


# Workflow Overview

CausalMixGPD uses a direct two-step workflow:

1. **Bundle** (`build_nimble_bundle`): Generate NIMBLE code and compile the sampler.
2. **MCMC** (`run_mcmc_bundle_manual`): Execute posterior sampling.

---

## Phase 1: Bundle (NIMBLE Code Generation & Compilation)

**Purpose**: Generate NIMBLE model code, compile sampler, prepare for MCMC execution.

### Building Directly


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
# Load packaged data
data("nc_pos200_k3", package = "CausalMixGPD")
y <- nc_pos200_k3$y

# Direct call
bundle_direct <- CausalMixGPD::build_nimble_bundle(
  y = y,
  kernel = "gamma",
  backend = "crp",
  GPD = FALSE,
  components = 5,
  mcmc = mcmc
)

print("Direct bundle creation successful.\n")
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
[1] "Direct bundle creation successful.\n"
```


:::
:::


### Inspecting Bundle Contents


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
# Bundle is an S3 object with structure
cat("Bundle class:", class(bundle_direct), "\n")
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
Bundle class: causalmixgpd_bundle 
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
cat("Bundle contains:\n")
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
Bundle contains:
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
print(names(bundle_direct))
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
[1] "spec"       "code"       "constants"  "dimensions" "data"      
[6] "inits"      "monitors"   "mcmc"       "epsilon"   
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
# Access key components
cat("\nMCMC settings:\n")
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```

MCMC settings:
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
print(bundle_direct$mcmc_settings)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
NULL
```


:::
:::


---

## Phase 3: MCMC Execution

**Purpose**: Run posterior sampling from the compiled bundle.

### Basic MCMC Run


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
# Run MCMC
fit <- load_or_fit("quickstart-basic-model-compile-run-fit", run_mcmc_bundle_manual(bundle_direct, show_progress = FALSE))
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
===== Monitors =====
thin = 1: alpha, scale, shape, z
===== Samplers =====
CRP_concentration sampler (1)
  - alpha
CRP_cluster_wrapper sampler (10)
  - scale[]  (5 elements)
  - shape[]  (5 elements)
CRP sampler (1)
  - z[1:200] 
```


:::

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
  [Warning] CRP_sampler: This MCMC is not for a proper model. The MCMC attempted to use more components than the number of cluster parameters. Please increase the number of cluster parameters.
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
cat("Fit object class:", class(fit), "\n")
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
Fit object class: mixgpd_fit list 
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
cat("MCMC execution complete. Posterior samples collected.\n")
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
MCMC execution complete. Posterior samples collected.
```


:::
:::


### Accessing Posterior Samples


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
# Posterior summary
print("\n--- POSTERIOR SUMMARY ---\n")
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
[1] "\n--- POSTERIOR SUMMARY ---\n"
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
summary(fit)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
MixGPD summary | backend: Chinese Restaurant Process | kernel: Gamma Distribution | GPD tail: FALSE | epsilon: 0.025
n = 200 | components = 5
Summary
Initial components: 5 | Components after truncation: 1

WAIC: 963.248
lppd: -456.908 | pWAIC: 24.716

Summary table

      alpha 0.457 0.398  0.022  0.354  1.503  42.38
   shape[1] 1.161 0.151  0.915  1.159  1.483 14.106
   scale[1] 0.265 0.037  0.204  0.266  0.338 25.996
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
# Posterior mean parameters in original form
params_fit <- params(fit)
params_fit
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```

$alpha
[1] "0.457"

[1] "0.883"
```

:::

## Complete Workflow: End-to-End Example


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
# Load packaged data
data("nc_pos200_k3", package = "CausalMixGPD")
y_data <- nc_pos200_k3$y

# PHASE 1: Bundle
bundle_final <- CausalMixGPD::build_nimble_bundle(
  y = y_data,
  kernel = "gamma",
  backend = "crp",
  GPD = FALSE,
  components = 5,
  mcmc = mcmc
)

# PHASE 2: MCMC
fit_final <- load_or_fit("quickstart-basic-model-compile-run-fit_final", run_mcmc_bundle_manual(bundle_final, show_progress = FALSE))
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
===== Monitors =====
thin = 1: alpha, scale, shape, z
===== Samplers =====
CRP_concentration sampler (1)
  - alpha
CRP_cluster_wrapper sampler (10)
  - scale[]  (5 elements)
  - shape[]  (5 elements)
CRP sampler (1)
  - z[1:200] 
```


:::

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
  [Warning] CRP_sampler: This MCMC is not for a proper model. The MCMC attempted to use more components than the number of cluster parameters. Please increase the number of cluster parameters.
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
print("\n=== THREE-PHASE WORKFLOW COMPLETE ===\n")
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
[1] "\n=== THREE-PHASE WORKFLOW COMPLETE ===\n"
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
summary(fit_final)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
MixGPD summary | backend: Chinese Restaurant Process | kernel: Gamma Distribution | GPD tail: FALSE | epsilon: 0.025
n = 200 | components = 5
Summary
Initial components: 5 | Components after truncation: 2

WAIC: 906.001
lppd: -382.021 | pWAIC: 70.979

Summary table
  parameter  mean    sd q0.025 q0.500 q0.975     ess
 weights[1] 0.544 0.074  0.408   0.54  0.681  20.835
 weights[2] 0.358 0.077  0.187   0.37   0.48  22.198
      alpha 0.607 0.389  0.134  0.519   1.59 104.174
   shape[1] 2.091 0.573  1.344  2.135  3.367  14.987
   shape[2] 2.805 0.895  1.179  2.992  4.062  11.818
   scale[1] 0.583 0.298   0.28   0.43   1.17  19.365
   scale[2] 1.032 0.644  0.304  0.844  2.226    4.07
```

## Backend Comparison: CRP vs Stick-Breaking

### CRP Backend


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
# Chinese Restaurant Process
bundle_crp <- CausalMixGPD::build_nimble_bundle(
  y = y_data,
  kernel = "gamma",
  backend = "crp",
  components = 5,
  mcmc = mcmc
)

fit_crp <- load_or_fit("quickstart-basic-model-compile-run-fit_crp", run_mcmc_bundle_manual(bundle_crp, show_progress = FALSE))
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
===== Monitors =====
thin = 1: alpha, scale, shape, z
===== Samplers =====
CRP_concentration sampler (1)
  - alpha
CRP_cluster_wrapper sampler (10)
  - scale[]  (5 elements)
  - shape[]  (5 elements)
CRP sampler (1)
  - z[1:200] 
```


:::

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
  [Warning] CRP_sampler: This MCMC is not for a proper model. The MCMC attempted to use more components than the number of cluster parameters. Please increase the number of cluster parameters.
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
print("CRP execution complete.\n")
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
[1] "CRP execution complete.\n"
```


:::
:::


### Stick-Breaking Backend


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
# Stick-Breaking Process
bundle_sb <- CausalMixGPD::build_nimble_bundle(
  y = y_data,
  kernel = "gamma",
  backend = "sb",
  components = 5,
  mcmc = mcmc
)

fit_sb <- load_or_fit("quickstart-basic-model-compile-run-fit_sb", run_mcmc_bundle_manual(bundle_sb, show_progress = FALSE))
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
===== Monitors =====
thin = 1: alpha, scale, shape, w, z
===== Samplers =====
RW sampler (10)
  - alpha
  - shape[]  (5 elements)
  - v[]  (4 elements)
conjugate sampler (5)
  - scale[]  (5 elements)
categorical sampler (200)
  - z[]  (200 elements)
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
print("SB execution complete.\n")
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
[1] "SB execution complete.\n"
```


:::
:::

## GPD Tail Augmentation

### Unconditional with GPD


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
# Data with tail behavior
data("nc_pos_tail200_k4", package = "CausalMixGPD")
y_tail <- nc_pos_tail200_k4$y

# Build with GPD
bundle_gpd <- CausalMixGPD::build_nimble_bundle(
  y = y_tail,
  kernel = "gamma",
  backend = "sb",
  GPD = TRUE,
  components = 6,
  mcmc = mcmc
)

fit_gpd <- load_or_fit("quickstart-basic-model-compile-run-fit_gpd", run_mcmc_bundle_manual(bundle_gpd, show_progress = FALSE))
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
===== Monitors =====
thin = 1: alpha, scale, shape, tail_scale, tail_shape, threshold, w, z
===== Samplers =====
RW sampler (21)
  - alpha
  - shape[]  (6 elements)
  - scale[]  (6 elements)
  - threshold
  - tail_scale
  - tail_shape
  - v[]  (5 elements)
categorical sampler (200)
  - z[]  (200 elements)
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
print("\nGPD augmentation applied to tail region.\n")
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
[1] "\nGPD augmentation applied to tail region.\n"
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
summary(fit_gpd)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
MixGPD summary | backend: Stick-Breaking Process | kernel: Gamma Distribution | GPD tail: TRUE | epsilon: 0.025
n = 200 | components = 6
Summary
Initial components: 6 | Components after truncation: 1

WAIC: 672.421
lppd: -327.394 | pWAIC: 8.816

Summary table
  parameter  mean    sd q0.025 q0.500 q0.975    ess
 weights[1] 0.738 0.179  0.474  0.795  0.955  1.163
      alpha 0.826 0.455  0.215  0.774  2.075 12.135
 tail_scale  1.48 0.161  1.148  1.491  1.811 37.167
 tail_shape 0.194 0.075   0.07  0.183   0.34  25.39
  threshold 0.688 0.065  0.515  0.716  0.772 10.999
   shape[1] 2.342 0.426  1.589  2.361  3.261 14.135
   scale[1] 1.296 0.727  0.603  0.974  3.466  8.982
```


:::
:::


---

## Summary of Key Functions

| Phase | Function | Input | Output |
|-------|----------|-------|--------|
| **1. Bundle** | `CausalMixGPD::build_nimble_bundle()` | y, X (optional), kernel, backend, GPD, components | `causalmixgpd_bundle` |
| **2. MCMC** | `run_mcmc_bundle_manual()` | bundle | `mixgpd_fit` |

---
